title: Halfdoors
description: A mod to add some smaller doors.
body: Join our Discord Server: For information, help, bug reports and anything else related to the project, join the [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/P4dUsxv6An)! About: Halfdoors is a little mod which adds a new door variation to the game, Halfdoors! They act just as normal doors but with a single block in height. Interested in hosting a server for any of my mods? Be sure to go with Bloom Host [here](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10). [](https://billing.bloom.host/aff.php?aff=10) Buying a server using this link supports me directly!
